titleStmt.title: SII 15.55: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 55. (B.K. No. 28 of 1930-31.) MAS≈™TI, BAGEVADI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab built into the wall (right of entrance) of the HanumƒÅn temple.
This is dated ≈öaka 1079, ƒ™≈õvara, ƒÄshƒÅ·∏çha ba. 2, Wednesday, Dakshi·πáƒÅyanasa·πÖkrama·πáa, corresponding to 1157 A.D., June 26.

It records a gift by KƒÅ·∏∑iyavve, daughter of RƒìvadƒÅsimayya, to a deity at Masuvati, situated in the Ka·πÅpa·πáa of Muttage Thirty in TarddavƒÅ·∏çi Thousand. The gift comprised of land made in favour of the SthƒÅnikas, the temple priest and BrƒÅhma·πáas of Bramhapuri. The record is badly damaged.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
